title: Return to Innocence
why_this_song: Return to Innocence by Enigma (1993) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "That will be the return to yourself"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Don't be afraid to be weak"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "The return to innocence"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "That will be the return to yourself"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And if you want, then start to laugh
If you must, then start to cry

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "return" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "return" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Don't be afraid to be weak
And if you want, then start to laugh
Don't give up and use the chance

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Return to Innocence", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Return to Innocence", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Return to Innocence" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Return to Innocence" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Return to Innocence" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Return to Innocence", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
